name: NK Captcha
description: North Korea regime criticism CAPTCHA — verify candidates are not DPRK operatives by asking them to type anti-regime phrases

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds allowed to complete the challenge

challengeCount.description: Number of phrases the user must type to pass

enableMediaRecording.description: Require users to record audio of themselves reading the phrase aloud

minRecordingDurationMs.description: Minimum recording duration in milliseconds to be considered valid
